title: Falcon - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom Button UI shows Microsoft Teams as default option with disconnected state message and modal prompt to switch to Other Providers when Teams is not detected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on Custom Button configuration
Observe the UI when Microsoft Teams is not detected by the app
expected: 1. When Microsoft Teams is not detected, the Custom Button UI shows two options: 'Microsoft Teams' (selected by default) and 'Other Providers', along with a message indicating Teams is not connected.\n2. Selecting 'Other Providers' reveals additional options: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.\n3. Switching back to 'Microsoft Teams' shows a modal confirming Teams is not connected and suggesting to select Other Providers instead.
